title: Add Required Field Validation for Migration Object Creation
description:
The application allowed saving a migration object record without an object identifier. Add client-side validation to require the identifier and name fields. Description remains optional.

### Additional UX Fix
Clean up spacing between the Update/Cancel buttons and the object description field — buttons were visually too close to the description text area.
acceptance_criteria: Object identifier field is required on save
Object name field is required on save
Update/Cancel buttons have proper spacing from the description field
Validation error is shown when required fields are empty
ux_changes: Required field indicators added to identifier and name. Button spacing cleaned up below the description field.
middleware_changes: Server-side validation added to reject object records without identifier or name.
comment_summary: Developer completed the validation and submitted for review.
